title: rubus calanthelos
intro: Rubus calanthelos, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus calanthelos include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. In traditional herbal medicine, Rubus calanthelos is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of tinctures and extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
